examples: Finding this condition may require tests other than an angiogram.
An angiogram shows the location and severity of blockages in blood vessels.
So even if a woman gets an all clear from an angiogram, she should get treatment if she has symptoms.
However, people who have the CT scans often end up needing the angiogram anyway.
An angiogram showed he had blockages in some coronary arteries, caused by fatty plaque over the years, doctors said.
